title: process_content: in_link closure duplicated between two functions
description:
LOCATION: src/content.rs:55-59 (process_content) and src/content.rs:163-166 (detect_quote_links)

FINDING: The in_link closure and the skip_ranges building block are copy-pasted identically into both process_content and detect_quote_links. Any fix to the binary-search logic (e.g. handling overlapping <a> tags) must be applied in both places.

IMPACT: Duplication means a bug fix in one copy does not fix the other. The correct fix is to extract a helper fn in_link(skip_ranges: &[(usize, usize)], pos: usize) -> bool.
